issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for DynamoDB operations.
The skill is vendor-locked to AWS and does not support other cloud providers or generic AI agents.

scenarios.name: create-orders-table-with-gsi-and-streams
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fully satisfy the rubric with correct command syntax and all required parameters.

scenarios.name: single-table-design-for-ecommerce-app
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric with a complete schema, create-table command, and sample put_item calls, while Response A is not provided and therefore cannot meet the requirements.
